name: zero
description: The Zero MCP connector and skill, nothing else — no hooks or scripts. Search a live index of paid AI capabilities (x402 / MPP) — live data, AI models, media generation, messaging — then call them and pay per use with a wallet. Connector-only alternative to the 'zero' plugin.

interface.shortDescription: Search and pay for AI capabilities from any agent.
interface.longDescription: Zero is a search engine and payment layer for AI agents. Discover external paid capabilities (x402 / MPP) — live data, AI models, media generation, messaging — call them, and pay per use with a wallet. No per-service signup. This plugin bundles only the Zero MCP connector and the 'zero' skill.
